identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a POS interface that feels like a tactical command center for gourmet operations.

headings.usage: Table numbers, prices, total amounts, receipt headers

body.usage: Menu items, modifier options, settings, reports

containers.glass_panel: bg-card/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-xl

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-14 font-bold tracking-wide uppercase shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(255,100,0,0.39)] transition-transform active:scale-95 rounded-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-14 font-semibold uppercase rounded-lg border border-white/10
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary/50 text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 h-14 font-bold uppercase rounded-lg
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 h-14 font-bold uppercase rounded-lg shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(255,0,0,0.39)]

cards.menu_item: group relative overflow-hidden bg-card border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 transition-all active:scale-[0.98] rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-between p-4 h-full
cards.order_ticket: bg-[#fffdf5] text-black font-mono shadow-md border-t-8 border-primary p-4 rounded-b-lg relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:bottom-0 after:left-0 after:right-0 after:h-2 after:bg-[linear-gradient(45deg,transparent_33.333%,#fff_33.333%,#fff_66.667%,transparent_66.667%),linear-gradient(-45deg,transparent_33.333%,#fff_33.333%,#fff_66.667%,transparent_66.667%)] after:bg-[length:20px_20px] after:bg-[position:0_10px]

inputs.pin_button: h-20 w-20 rounded-full text-3xl font-bold bg-secondary hover:bg-primary hover:text-black transition-colors flex items-center justify-center border-2 border-white/5
inputs.search_bar: bg-secondary/50 border-none h-12 text-lg focus:ring-primary/50 pl-12 rounded-full

table_map.container: relative w-full h-full bg-[#1a1a1c] overflow-hidden grid-bg
table_map.table_node: absolute flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-white transition-all cursor-move shadow-xl backdrop-blur-md border-2
table_map.area_tab: px-6 py-3 rounded-t-lg bg-card/50 hover:bg-card border-t border-x border-white/10 text-muted-foreground data-[state=active]:text-primary data-[state=active]:bg-background data-[state=active]:border-primary/50 transition-all font-oswald tracking-wide

assets.font_awesome: For specific industry icons if needed

universal_guidelines: NEVER use gradients for the main background. Use the 'grid-bg' pattern.
Use 'Oswald' font for all prices and numeric data.
All monetary values must be formatted as RD$ X,XXX.XX
Waiters need speed: Don't bury actions in dropdowns. Use grids of buttons.
Kitchen screens must be high contrast (Black/White/Red/Green) readable from 2 meters away.
Bill splitting must be drag-and-drop or simple tap-to-assign.
Offline mode indicator must be visible at all times.
instructions_to_main_agent: Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the new colors and font families.
Create a `Layout` component that handles the Sidebar/TopBar structure.
Implement the 'PinPad' as a reusable component.
For the Kitchen Display, create a 'Ticket' component that looks like a physical paper receipt but digital.
Ensure 'Order' screen has a category sidebar and a product grid.
